items.name_cn:
OnTheGo Small Series | CODE:M45779
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for full-grain leather this season in the OnTheGo Small series
The OnTheGo Small tote bag draws inspiration from the classic 1968 Sac Plat handbag, featuring a miniature version in Monogram Empreinte leather with a pressed Medium Bicolor Monogram pattern, capable of holding daily essentials like an iPad Mini. Flexible handles and a detachable shoulder strap offer various carrying options.

items.name_cn:
OnTheGo Small Series | CODE:M46373
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for this season's new arrivals in the OnTheGo Small Series.
OnTheGo Small handbag features a mix of Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant patterns. The Toron handle and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin pouch is perfect for coins or small essentials. Combining fashion and versatility, the designer truly understands every woman.

items.name_cn:
Overseas Top-tier Original M80091 Green Three-piece MULTI POCHETTE FÉLICIE
The main bag can fit the largest iPhone, with an inner compartment and three card slots. The small card bag can be detached and used separately in other bags or hung anywhere. Adjustable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder, crossbody, and other carrying styles. Perfect combination of practicality and trendiness.
Dimensions: 17x9.6x3.5cm
